chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ وَ الْمَرِيضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – The Salāt of an elderly man and the sick

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/332)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/332)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَ تُصَلِّي النَّوَافِلَ وَ أَنْتَ قَاعِدٌ فَقَالَ مَا أُصَلِّيهَا إِلَّا وَ أَنَا قَاعِدٌ مُنْذُ حَمَلْتُ هَذَا اللَّحْمَ وَ بَلَغْتُ هَذَا السِّنَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hannan Bin Sadeyr, from his father who said,

‘I said to Abu Ja’farasws, ‘Are youasws praying the optional Salāt while youasws are seated?’ So heasws said: ‘Iasws have not prayed it except while seated until after Iasws have gained this much weight and reaching this age’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hanan ibn Sadir from his father who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ’Do you perform optional Salah (prayer) in a sitting position? He (the Imam) replied, ‘I perform them in a sitting position only from the time I have gained this much weight and reached this age.’”
